title: Give to a registered charity or another type of qualified donee - Canada.ca
content:
## Give to a registered charity or another type of qualified donee
When you donate to a registered charity or another type of qualified donee , you are supporting the charitable sector, as well as communities in Canada or abroad. You may also be able to receive an official donation receipt for your gift.

### What to know before you give
What to do before you donate, eligible gifts, official donation receipts, claim a donation tax credit or deduction

### Avoid donation-related scams
Donating wisely, warning signs of donation-related fraud, how to avoid donation tax shelter schemes

### Donate to disaster or emergency relief
Find registered charities or other qualified donees providing disaster or emergency relief, donating to organizations that are not qualified donees

### Report suspected donation-related scams or other non-compliance
How to report, examples of fraud and non-compliance, what to know before reporting
- About registered charities and other qualified donees
- How to get information about a charity
- CG-010 Qualified donees

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
